scripts.setup: [[ "$CONDUCTOR_PORT" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] || exit 1 && eval $(op signin) && op inject -i .env.template -o .env.local && echo "APP_URL=\"http://localhost:$CONDUCTOR_PORT\"" >> .env.local && mkdir -p .vercel && printf '{"projectId":"%s","orgId":"%s"}' "$(op item get construction-local-dev --vault celn --field VERCEL_PROJECT_ID --reveal)" "$(op item get construction-local-dev --vault celn --field VERCEL_ORG_ID --reveal)" > .vercel/project.json && npm install
